workflow_runs.name: Build Android APK
workflow_runs.display_title: feat(ui): simplify home screen and integrate tool calling

head_commit.message:
feat(ui): simplify home screen and integrate tool calling

- Filter home screen to show only AI Chat task card
- Fix tasksByCategories type declaration for Kotlin compiler
- Add long press gesture on input field to start audio recording
- Integrate AgentTools into LlmChatTask for function calling support
- Enable image and audio input support in AI Chat
- Add skills and MCP tools injection into system prompt

This implements the UI simplification design to provide a single entry
point (AI Chat) with intelligent tool calling for all features.
